sentence_reviews.text: Deduplication and decontamination remove repeated or benchmark-overlapping examples while retaining provenance needed to audit corpus composition.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning dataset and methodology context; AIMA data collection/assessment/management; PML data and preprocessing topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: The packet sources support data management generally but do not directly support deduplication, benchmark decontamination, or provenance auditing.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Deduplication, contamination control & provenance is to connect Data collection, curation & filtering, Embeddings & distributed representations to downstream capabilities including Large language models.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA data management and language-model topics; PML word embeddings/language models; Deep Learning dataset and representation-learning context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Data curation, embeddings, and language models are all relevant in the sources, but the specific dedup/decontamination/provenance-to-LLM relationship is not directly evidenced.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA language models and pretrained contextual representations; Deep Learning sequence and language-model background.
sentence_reviews.notes: The sources support language models generally, but not deduplication/decontamination/provenance as a substrate for LLMs.

sentence_reviews.text: combined with Data collection, curation & filtering
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA data collection/assessment/management; PML data and preprocessing topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Deduplication and contamination control are data-curation activities, but this is inferred from general data-management evidence rather than directly stated.

sentence_reviews.text: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Data collection, curation & filtering, Embeddings & distributed representations.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA/PML data management and preprocessing; PML/AIMA embeddings and word-representation topics; Deep Learning methodology context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Data quality and embedding relevance are partly supported. The generic limitations and direct dependency list are broader than the cited evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: Deduplication, contamination control & provenance uses Data collection, curation & filtering as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA data collection/assessment/management; PML data and preprocessing topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Deduplication and decontamination are defensible curation/filtering operations, though the source support is general.

sentence_reviews.text: Deduplication, contamination control & provenance uses Embeddings & distributed representations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML and AIMA word embeddings/vector representations; Deep Learning representation-learning context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Embeddings can support semantic duplicate detection, but the cited packet sources do not directly connect embeddings to deduplication/provenance.

sentence_reviews.text: Deduplication, contamination control & provenance uses Databases & information retrieval as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA data collection/assessment/management and information-retrieval/search-related topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Data management and retrieval are plausibly relevant, but direct support for this specific dependency is weak.

edge_reviews.notes: Deduplication/decontamination are curation/filtering activities; core strength is defensible but generally sourced.
Embeddings are useful for semantic similarity, but they are not always required for deduplication/provenance and the packet evidence does not directly support core strength.
Databases/IR are plausible implementation supports for corpus search and matching, but direct source support is weak. Common strength is plausible.
